format.description: Always use j1 value for this parameter

text.value: The current weather in New York, NY is sunny with a temperature of 23°C (74°F). It feels like 24°C (76°F). The humidity is 38%, with a wind speed of 10 km/h (6 mph) coming from the west. The UV index is 7, indicating a high level of UV radiation, so it's important to wear sun protection if you're outside. Visibility is excellent at 16 km (9 miles).
What is the weather in New York, NY?
